calendar.matters:
Amended Declaratory Relief Petition For Order That Porposed Action Wil Not Consititute A Contest.
Off Calendar May-12-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Barrett Schaefer for Daniel J. O'Hara and Richard O'Hara, Petitioners.

The Court stated that there are no oppositions to the Petition, granted and signed the Order in open court.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.
